title: Zot's Only Silver
description: Adds silver ore, tools and other things to SimpleOres2.
body:
Back in the day, the original Simple Ores from Minecraft 1.5.2 or earlier had silver ore instead of tin ore.  The original author, AleXndrtheGr8st/Skrallexy, removed silver ore and replaced it with tin ore in Minecraft 1.6.4.  It turns out that there was still some demand for a silver ore, so Zot201 created Only Silver as an add-on for SimpleOres that put back silver ore and silver tools, and added some enchantments for silver items and, eventually, a silver golem. Zot201 maintained the original OnlySilver through Minecraft 1.7.10, 1.8, 1.9.4, and 1.10.2. Alas, Zot201 is no longer maintaining their old mods. Fortunately, they licensed it with a FOSS (free and open source) license, that allows others to port and modify the original mod.  

Not only is silver a metal in demand for many tech mods, OnlySilver (or other source of silver) is also a required dependency for one of akkamaddi's mods that I will be porting, "Silver & Black".  Therefore, welcome back "Zot's Only Silver", providing silver ore and tools and other silver things for Simple Ores mods.  

 For Minecraft **1.14.4 to 1.16.1**, OnlySilver is a standalone mod, not dependent on any other mod. (Though JEI, as always, is recommended).  
For Minecraft **1.16.3 and later**, SimpleCoreLib is a required dependency.  
 
The original version of Only Silver can be found [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/onlysilver).  The original Minecraft Forum thread is [here](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1291079-onlysilver-a-lost-ore-from-simpleores). Regrettably, since i do not own the early versions of Zot's Only Silver, and I have lost contact with Zot, I do not have permission to post older versions of the mod. Until I get permission, no 1.7.10 or 1.12.2 versions here, alas.

A minor change from the original: building a silver golem requires the use of a silver wand. First, create a silver wand from a silver rod and a silver nugget:

![silver wand recipe](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/t1cWFsPY/images/233b56696b358b254ba490c6a28b27bc69810f1a.png)

![silver rod recipe](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/t1cWFsPY/images/21b394b049ed9bd604041f0a49b0a671cf82d382.png)

Build your golem pattern with 1 silver block and a carved pumpkin/jack o'lantern (image is out-of-date): 

![Silver golem pattern](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/t1cWFsPY/images/34863b76c6f50be09e24d00419be08374c2f183d.png) Then click on it with your silver wand: ![Click with the wand](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/t1cWFsPY/images/5b34a5fc8316be5418d8f5e71750f23c77d04955.png)

 And presto! Silver Golem:

![Silver Golem](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/t1cWFsPY/images/dfe61dbfc13868e75d1e77f7bade1ffd3f61843d.png)
